name: Wisma Syariah Lambhuk Banda Aceh RedPartner

hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 2.65 km from property

contentSummary.displayName: Wisma Syariah Lambhuk Banda Aceh RedPartner
contentSummary.defaultName: Wisma Syariah Lambhuk Banda Aceh RedPartner
contentSummary.localeName: Wisma Syariah Lambhuk Banda Aceh RedPartner

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Infant 0-0 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 1-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviews.hotelName: Wisma Syariah Lambhuk Banda Aceh RedPartner

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Wisma Syariah Lambhuk Banda Aceh RedPartner
comments.reviewComments: Jangan pernh pesan wisma syariah lambhuk via agoda. Karena penipuan. Td malam sy sudah pesan via agoda dan sudah bayar via livin mandiri doku. Begitu sampai ke tempat ternyata pesanan kami tidak masuk. Dan kata pihak wisma (properti) bhw mereka tidak kerja sama dengan agoda. Nomr hp yg terlampir diinvoice wisma nmr palsu fiktif tidqk dapat dihubungi. Mohon agoda kerjasamanya untuk mengembalikan uang saya.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Wisma Syariah Lambhuk Banda Aceh RedPartner
comments.reviewNegatives: Wi-Fi could be better in the bungalow
